description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in DMXReady Secure Login Manager 1.0 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via unspecified parameters to (1) set_preferences.asp, (2) send_password_preferences.asp, and (3) SecureLoginManager/list.asp in the Local-Admin Panel; (4) the sent parameter to (a) login.asp, (b) content.asp, and (c) members.asp in the Remote-WebSite; and (5) the sent parameter to applications/SecureLoginManager/inc_secureloginmanager.asp in the Live Demo.
